toast.source: Parsed from the Toast single-location 'Daily Performance Summary' email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Thursday, June 4', no-reply@toasttab.com). This single-location email DOES include same-day-last-week and 4-week-average comparison columns.
toast.note: Thu Jun 4 single-location (229 W Montecito) daily parsed WITH comparison columns: Net $4,438.76 vs same-day-last-week (Thu May 28) $3,435.85 = +29.2%. Gross $4,729.31 vs $3,618.10 = +30.7%. 169 guests vs 124 (+36%), 114 orders vs 86 (+33%). Avg/guest $26.26, avg/order $38.94. LABOR 32.2% of net (~$1,428.87). Discounts $290.55, voids $66.50, $0 refunds, $0 gift cards. 4-wk-avg net $4,572.50 (Jun 4 ran -2.9% under avg). Friday Jun 5 daily not yet delivered (arrives ~7:40 AM).
